title: LA28 Announces Verified Multi-Platform Ticket Resale Program Opening in 2027 - LA 2028
summary_full: LA28 Announces Verified Multi-Platform Ticket Resale Program Opening in 2027  LA 2028Olympics tickets have a 24% service fee – and it's raising eyebrows among Angelenos  LAistFans eager and hopeful as pre-sale tickets for 2028 Olympics in LA go on sale  ABC7 Los Angeles'A total scam': LA Olympics ticket sales are already messy  SFGATEL.A. 2028 Olympic tickets go on sale this week. Here’s everything you need to know  Los Angeles Times
